# CWE-501 negative: approval kept separate from request payload (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-501-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type payoutRequest struct {
	Amount float64 `json:"amount"`
	Memo   string  `json:"memo"`
}

type payoutDecision struct {
	Approved bool          `json:"approved"`
	Request  payoutRequest `json:"request"`
}

func QueuePayout(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	var req payoutRequest
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	out := payoutDecision{Approved: true, Request: req}
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(out)
}
